error_signature: previous/current not present in manual execution
title: Mismatch in Google Sheets Trigger output during manual execution
symptom: When testing the Google Sheets Trigger manually, the output structure does not include 'previous' and 'current' data, leading to unresolved expressions.
not_this_if: Workflow is activated and running in production
root_cause: Manual executions of the Google Sheets Trigger do not receive real events from Google, resulting in a sample payload that lacks the full structure of a production update event. This is expected behavior and documented for Google triggers.
fix_steps: Activate the workflow to allow the Google Sheets Trigger to run in production mode.
Update an existing row in the Google Sheet to generate a real event.
Inspect the execution in the Executions panel to see the real 'previous' and 'current' data.
Use Debug / Copy to editor to continue building downstream logic with the real data.
agent_instruction: Activate the workflow and update a row in the Google Sheet to capture the real trigger data.
